pre_registration.hypothesis: Swarm depends on 4-6 mathematical frameworks; at least one has violated core assumptions
pre_registration.threshold: Classify >=5 frameworks as REAL/MIXED/DECORATIVE; find >=1 assumption violation with evidence
pre_registration.falsification: All frameworks correctly applied; no assumption violations detectable

method: Classify each math framework: (1) operationalized (load-bearing), (2) core assumptions tested, (3) predictions used vs labels borrowed. Test UCB1 stationarity via merge-rate drift by era (n=69 dispatches). Verify Bayesian ECE. Audit NK theory predictions vs actual use.

ucb1_stationarity.note: merge-rate stationarity mostly holds; lesson-yield stationarity untested

nk_predictions_tested.actual_use: linear complexity proxy only: K_avg * N + Cycles

UCB1.assumption_stationarity: HOLDS for merge-rate (median drift=0.0); lesson-yield untested

NK_complexity.gap: K_avg=2.09 near-critical claim uses NK label without testing phase-transition consequences

information_theory.reason: F-IS1 REFUTED (entropy near-constant); F-IS3 RESOLVED (spawn_math framing-wrong)

power_laws.reason: Zipf alpha=0.21 for principles citations (flat, L-218)

finding: 4 REAL load-bearing frameworks (UCB1, Bayesian ECE, graph topology, Simpson's as analytical tool). 1 MIXED (NK label borrowed, theory unapplied). 2 DECORATIVE (information theory orphaned, power laws weak). Key gap: NK predicts non-linear phase transition at K=2 — swarm treats K_avg as a linear proxy only. If the K=2 criticality is real, cross-domain integration problems are qualitatively hard (not just quantitatively), which explains F-NK6's 17.5x resolution gap as theoretical rather than operational.
actual: 5 frameworks classified with evidence; UCB1 stationarity holds for merge-rate; NK label gap identified as highest-value untested prediction; information theory confirmed orphaned
diff: Expected UCB1 non-stationarity to be primary gap; actual finding: NK theory predictions are completely unapplied — deeper label-vs-substance problem; UCB1 stationarity is largely fine (median drift=0)
